title: G&T Ore Growth ATO - SG Support
description: This is a mod that adds support for Silent Gems and All The Ores mods to work with the Ore Growth Mod.
body:
This is a mod that adds support for Silent Gems and All The Ores (found at Curse Forge) to work with Ore Growth should you have them installed.

It makes this:

https://modrinth.com/mod/ore-growth

Work for these:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ato

https://modrinth.com/mod/silents-gems

This mod will do nothing alone without Ore Growth and at least one of the two others installed.
